name: Lucid Group, Inc.
description: Lucid Group, Inc. is an American electric vehicle manufacturer headquartered in Newark, California. The company focuses on designing, developing, and building luxury electric vehicles, most notably the Lucid Air sedan. Lucid is recognized for its advanced proprietary powertrain technology and battery systems, which deliver industry-leading range and performance. By integrating sustainable energy solutions with high-end automotive design, Lucid aims to accelerate the global transition to sustainable transportation while setting new standards for efficiency and luxury in the electric vehicle market.
